name: reconstruction_synthetic_v1
purpose: Create the explicit public LEAF Synthetic input used by the CUDA seed-42 reconstruction screen; never a paper-reproduction input claim.

preprocess.evaluation_client_selection: 30 users selected with seed 42 from the complete valid generated user pool

parameter_provenance.leaf_revision: REPO_EXISTING: CUDA reconstruction screening evidence log
parameter_provenance.evaluation_client_selection: USER_SPECIFIED seeded-random subject selection; not manuscript-specified

limitations: The manuscript names a LEAF Synthetic benchmark but does not establish these generator options as its paper input.
Output from this manifest is RECONSTRUCTION_INPUT_ONLY and may only support reconstruction-screening results.
